condition: Severe shoulder injury, suspected rotator cuff tear or ligament damage
onset: About two weeks after lifting a heavy object
pain_location: Front and side of the shoulder; extends down to the arm
pain_nature: Sharp pain during hand movements, throbbing pain during rest, frequent intense tingling sensations
duration: About two weeks without significant relief
previous_history: Occasional strain due to exercise before this injury
functional_limitations: Raising arm or lifting shoulder is extremely difficult
medical_history: No major medical conditions, overall health normal
red_flags: Large swelling in the area (about 8-9 inches), spreading pain, numbness and tingling in the hand
treatments_taken: Anti-inflammatory medications, rest, consultation with a doctor but no significant treatment was recommended
